task_completion.description: Verify the session contains the required audio tracks and the cue bus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the mixer or editor window in Ardour. Confirm there are audio tracks named 'Click Track', 'Bass', and 'Vocal', and a bus track named 'Drummer Cue'.

task_completion.description: Verify that pre-fader sends are created on the required tracks and routed to the 'Drummer Cue' bus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the mixer strips for 'Click Track', 'Bass', and 'Vocal', look at the processor box located above the main fader (indicating pre-fader). There should be a send processor visible in each, explicitly routed to 'Drummer Cue'.

task_completion.description: Verify the send gain for the 'Click Track' is set to approximately 0 dB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the send level indicator or pop-up fader for the 'Click Track' send to 'Drummer Cue'. The value should read 0.0 dB (acceptable range is -2.0 dB to +2.0 dB).

task_completion.description: Verify the send gain for the 'Bass' track is set to approximately -12.0 dB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the send level indicator or pop-up fader for the 'Bass' send to 'Drummer Cue'. The value should read -12.0 dB (acceptable range is -14.0 dB to -10.0 dB).

task_completion.description: Verify the send gain for the 'Vocal' track is set to approximately -6.0 dB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the send level indicator or pop-up fader for the 'Vocal' send to 'Drummer Cue'. The value should read -6.0 dB (acceptable range is -8.0 dB to -4.0 dB).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Drummer Cue' bus is disconnected from the Master output.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the output routing button at the very bottom of the 'Drummer Cue' mixer strip. It should NOT be routed to 'Master' (it may show as unassigned, '-', or routed to a specific hardware output instead).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Ardour GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Ardour application interface open and being actively manipulated (e.g., mixer window, routing grid, or send dialogs), rather than just a text editor modifying Ardour XML session files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is working in the correct session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ardour main window title bar should display 'MyProject' as the active session name.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI setup.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show scripts or commands directly injecting XML nodes into the Ardour session file to create the tracks or sends.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bus name: 'Drummer Cue'. Required tracks: 'Click Track', 'Bass', 'Vocal'. Target pre-fader send gains: Click Track at 0.0 dB, Bass at -12.0 dB, Vocal at -6.0 dB. A tolerance of +/- 2.0 dB is acceptable for all gain levels.
